title: apply_set_modifiers uses sort_by_key; prefer sort_unstable_by_key
description: apply_set_modifiers (evaluator.rs line 719) calls sorted.sort_by_key(...). Since modifier precedence values are Copy integers and stability of equal elements is irrelevant (RFC 5229 §4 defines at most one modifier per precedence level), sort_unstable_by_key is more idiomatic and avoids a potential allocation. Clippy's map_unwrap_or / stable_sort_primitive lint may flag this.
